title: crotalaria multiflora
intro: Crotalaria multiflora, also known as the many-flowered rattlebox or rattle bush, is a plant species that belongs to the pea family, Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Crotalaria multiflora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Crotalaria multiflora typically involve drying the leaves and stems, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
